summary: Shadow Nexus backend tested end-to-end via pytest against http://localhost:8001/api (also verified external ingress https://phantom-grid.preview.emergentagent.com). 39/39 tests passed including: register/login (+remember_me), forgot-password (known + unknown email branch), JWT-protected /auth/me, character options + create-once enforcement, dashboard HUD aggregation (xp_progress, current_mission, 3 deterministic daily challenges), chapters with level-gated unlock and sequential mission unlock, mission completion flow (XP/coins/items/achievement awarding, level-up advance, already-completed rejection, puzzle/combat fail branches), combat setup with derived player stats, NPC catalog (system_prompt hidden), NPC chat through Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations producing a non-fallback reply, conversation history persistence, inventory listing + equip validation, skill tree with can_unlock gating, achievements (first-mission unlock observed), daily challenge determinism, and leaderboard sort order. No critical issues found.

minor.issue: daily_seed_index() uses built-in hash() which is per-process randomized (PYTHONHASHSEED). With multiple uvicorn workers, the same user could see different daily challenge sets on each request. Use hashlib (e.g., md5/sha1) for cross-process deterministic seeding.
Returns reset_token_demo in JSON. Acceptable for demo but should be feature-flagged off in production to avoid token leakage.
allow_origins=['*'] combined with allow_credentials=True is rejected by strict browsers and is a security smell. Restrict to the frontend origin in production.

react_native_issues.issue: Expo logs show repeated warning: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' (frontend out of scope this run, flagging for next iteration).

action_items: (Optional) Replace built-in hash() in daily_seed_index() with hashlib-based digest for multi-worker determinism.
(Optional) Gate reset_token_demo behind a DEBUG/DEMO env flag before going to production.
(Frontend, next iteration) Replace deprecated React Native shadow* props with boxShadow.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 781 lines; consider splitting into routers (auth, character, missions, npcs, skills, etc.) once iteration cadence allows.
MongoDB ObjectId is correctly excluded everywhere via {"_id": 0} projection — good.
JWT secret and EMERGENT_LLM_KEY read from env — good. JWT_SECRET present, EMERGENT_LLM_KEY present.

Achievement XP awards bypass apply_xp's level-up logic (XP is added but level not recomputed inside check_achievements). Apply_xp should be called for achievement XP too, otherwise huge achievement XP (e.g., ach_legend = 1000) won't trigger a level-up.
seed_data_creation: Fresh TEST_<hex>@nexus.io users created at runtime by fixtures; no manual seeding required. Static seed_data.py drives chapters/missions/NPCs/items.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully passing. When testing frontend, use EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=https://phantom-grid.preview.emergentagent.com. Auth flow: register → /api/character (avatar_1..avatar_22, classes: security_analyst/penetration_tester/malware_hunter/network_defender/digital_forensics) → dashboard. Use Bearer JWT in Authorization header. NPC chat through Claude Sonnet 4.5 works (response in ~5-10s).
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs to RCA. Two initial test-side assertion mismatches (uppercase vs. lowercase email) were due to backend's intentional email lower-casing during register/login; tests were corrected to compare case-insensitively.
